title: Louisiana Association of Disability Examiners — Shreveport (LADE-Shreveport) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Governing constitution and by-laws of the Louisiana Association of Disability Examiners – Shreveport (LADE-Shreveport), a chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) in the Southwest Region. Covers chapter name, NADE relationship, definitions, purpose, membership (association members employed by a public or private agency in Louisiana), meetings, elections, officers, Board of Directors, committees, parliamentary authority, amendments, and the Convention of Delegates. Signed by President Shawn Riddle and Secretary Phyllis Lockwood; revised 1991.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Louisiana / Shreveport (LADE-Shreveport) Chapter
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Louisiana Association of Disability Examiners – Shreveport (LADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'louisiana-Shr-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived. 'SHR' = Shreveport, one of three Louisiana NADE chapters (B-R=Baton Rouge, NO=New Orleans, SHR=Shreveport). The document text states it was revised and adopted by the LADE-Shreveport Board with a 'Revised 1991' date, captured in temporal_coverage. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
